texto: All friends have secrets. We're like three-dimensional shapes on paper
autor: we all have hidden sides. And there's some secrets we don't even reveal to ourselves.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a we all have hidden sides. And there's some secrets we don't even reveal to ourselves.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “All friends have secrets. We're like three-dimensional shapes on paper” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, nenia-campbell, bound-to-accept pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e bound-to-accept.
